text: You people never learn. Go back where you came from — nobody wants you here.
This tutorial is useless garbage. The author is an idiot and wasted my time.
That's so gay — only losers care about that stuff.
Kids these days are all lazy and entitled; when I was young we had discipline and respect.
If we don't stop them by any means, they'll destroy everything we built. Sometimes extreme measures are the only answer.
